data.name: DataEntry_Title
data.value: Entry of required information + Processed Metrics

data.name: DataEntry_Instructions
data.value: For proper execution of the analysis, you are required to complete only the cells shaded in gray and in bold.

data.name: RegisteredBusinesses_Tooltip
data.value: How many businesses are currently on the municipal register for this revenue stream.

data.name: EstimatedUnregisteredPercent_Tooltip
data.value: Best estimate of how many active businesses are not on the register.

data.name: TotalEstimatedBusinesses_Tooltip
data.value: Total estimated active businesses in the jurisdiction. Formula: Registered × (1 + Unregistered %)

data.name: BilledAmount_Tooltip
data.value: Total value of invoices/assessments issued to registered businesses during the year.

data.name: OutstandingAmount_Tooltip
data.value: Total billed but not yet paid (arrears on the current year bill). Also equals the pure compliance gap at current fees.

data.name: RevenueToDate_Tooltip
data.value: What has actually been collected in cash so far in the year. Formula: Billed - Outstanding.

data.name: CompliantBusinesses_Tooltip
data.value: Estimated using proxy formula: Registered × (Revenue to Date / Billed). Accounts for partial payments across fiscal year.

data.name: StatutoryAverageBilled_Tooltip
data.value: The average annual bill implied by the official fee schedule as written in law, without applying waivers, discounts, or exemptions. It represents the policy reference level.

data.name: RealisticImprovementPercent_Tooltip
data.value: The share of the gap between today's average bill and the statutory average that you believe can realistically be closed through policy or administrative reforms (not full enforcement). Input as % (0-100).

data.name: AvgBilledAmount_Tooltip
data.value: The mean annual bill actually issued to each registered business under today's billing practice. It's the anchor for the 'today' side of the matrix. Formula: Billed amount / Registered businesses.

data.name: AchievableAvgBill_Tooltip
data.value: The projected average bill after applying the realistic improvement toward the statutory level. Powers the right-hand 'liability' column of the matrix. Formula: Avg Billed + (Realistic improvement % x (Statutory Avg - Avg Billed)).

data.name: DeltaA_Tooltip
data.value: The achievable increase in billing per business. Formula: Realistic improvement % x MAX(0, Statutory average - Average billed).

data.name: ComplianceRatio_Tooltip
data.value: Provides a proxy indicator of the compliance system performance for this stream. Formula: Revenue to Date / Billed Amount. >80% Green, 60-80% Yellow, <60% Red.

data.name: CoverageRatio_Tooltip
data.value: Provides a proxy indicator of the coverage system performance for this stream. Formula: Registered / Total Estimated businesses. >80% Green, 60-80% Yellow, <60% Red.

data.name: PotentialRevenue_Title
data.value: Potential Revenue Breakdown (Actual Revenue + Gap breakdown)

data.name: RevenueToDate_TableTooltip
data.value: This is the cash actually collected so far in the year from registered businesses. It is the 'actual revenue' slice in the chart and the bottom-left cell of the matrix.

data.name: ComplianceGap_Tooltip
data.value: The amount already billed to registered businesses that remains unpaid (arrears for the year). Captures non-payment among those on the register at today's billing level. Formula: Outstanding amount.

data.name: CoverageGap_Tooltip
data.value: Revenue not collected because some active businesses are not registered and therefore were not billed at all--valued at today's average bill. Formula: (Total estimated - Registered) x Average billed amount.

data.name: LiabilityGap_Tooltip
data.value: Additional revenue you could obtain from businesses that already pay if billing were improved part-way toward the statutory level (realistic improvement). Formula: Compliant businesses x Delta A.

data.name: MixedGapComplianceLiability_Tooltip
data.value: Extra revenue that would appear only if both (i) non-payers among the registered start paying AND (ii) billing is raised by the realistic improvement toward the statutory average. Formula: (Registered - Compliant) x Delta A.

data.name: MixedGapCoverageLiability_Tooltip
data.value: Extra revenue that would appear only if both (i) unregistered businesses are brought onto the register AND (ii) billing is raised by the realistic improvement toward the statutory average. Formula: (Total estimated - Registered) x Delta A.

data.name: PotentialRevenuePie_Description
data.value: This pie chart illustrates the percentage distribution of the total potential revenue from the billing system. It visually shows the share corresponding to the revenue actually collected during the year, as well as the contribution of each type of gap (uncollected or lost revenue) to that total.

data.name: MatrixDashboard_Description
data.value: This matrix visualization shows the business license gap analysis across two dimensions: the number of businesses (vertical axis from Compliant to Estimated) and the billing level (horizontal axis from average billed to achievable billing). Each colored cell represents a different type of gap or revenue component.

data.name: GapBreakdownPie_Description
data.value: This pie chart illustrates the percentage distribution of the revenue gaps. It visually shows the contribution of each type of gap to the total uncollected revenue, helping to identify which gaps are the most significant.
